---
title: "Invoice"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: true
params:
  items: NULL
  taxes: 0
  total: 0
---

# 🧾 Receipt Summary

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(dplyr)

params$items %>%
  mutate(Total = Price * Quantity) %>%
  kable("latex", booktabs = TRUE, align = "lccc", 
        col.names = c("Item", "Price", "Quantity", "Total")) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "repeat_header"), font_size = 12)

# knitr::include_graphics("barcode.png")
